events.text: You're getting ready for a first date. Your palms are sweaty and you keep changing outfits.

choices.label: Take a deep breath and go
choices.resultText: The date goes fine. You laugh at your own nervousness.

choices.label: Cancel at the last minute
choices.resultText: You stay home. Relief mixes with a twinge of regret.

events.text: Your partner wants you to meet their parents over Sunday lunch. The table is set and everyone is watching.

choices.label: Bring a thoughtful gift
choices.resultText: The parents warm up. Your partner squeezes your hand under the table.

choices.label: Wing it and hope for the best
choices.resultText: Awkward silences abound. You survive on polite smiles.

events.text: You and your partner argue about money — savings, bills, and whether that new purchase was necessary.

choices.label: Sit down and make a budget together
choices.resultText: It's tense but productive. You agree on a plan.

choices.label: Storm off and spend to feel better
choices.resultText: Retail therapy feels good briefly. The argument lingers.

events.text: Your wedding anniversary is coming up. A nice dinner would mark the occasion properly.

choices.label: Book a fancy dinner out
choices.resultText: Candles, good food, and quiet laughter. A night to remember.

choices.label: Cook at home and keep it simple
choices.resultText: Homemade stew and old stories. Simple and sweet.

events.text: Your partner comes home buzzing — they got promoted at work! They're already planning how to celebrate.

choices.label: Celebrate properly
choices.resultText: You toast their success. Pride fills the room.

choices.label: Remind them you had a long day too
choices.resultText: The mood deflates. They wanted more enthusiasm.

events.text: Your child's first day of school arrives. Tiny uniform, oversized backpack, and brave tears at the gate.

choices.label: Walk them to class personally
choices.resultText: They cling to your hand, then wave goodbye. You blink back tears.

choices.label: Let the {transportMode} handle it
choices.resultText: The {transportMode} pulls away. You hope they made friends by recess.

events.text: Tension flares between your partner and one of your parents. Old habits and new loyalties collide at a family gathering.

choices.label: Mediate calmly
choices.resultText: Nobody wins outright, but the shouting stops.

choices.label: Take your partner's side
choices.resultText: Your partner appreciates the loyalty. A parent goes quiet.

events.text: You and your spouse have been talking about having another child. Diapers, school fees, and sleepless nights loom large.

choices.label: Let's do it
choices.resultText: You agree to expand the family. Excitement and nerves mix together.

choices.label: Not right now
choices.resultText: You table the idea for later. Relief and disappointment share the room.

events.text: Your spouse shows you photos of rescue puppies online. They want to adopt one this weekend.

choices.label: Visit the shelter together
choices.resultText: A wagging tail greeted you at the door that evening.

choices.label: Say the timing is wrong
choices.resultText: They closed the laptop quietly. The apartment felt colder.

events.text: Your sibling calls in tears. They need a large loan to cover rent and medical bills before month end.

choices.label: Lend what you can afford
choices.resultText: They promised to repay you. Family came first.

choices.label: Refuse — you are saving too
choices.resultText: The call ended abruptly. Silence lingered for weeks.

events.text: Someone you have been dating admits they are still paying off a hidden debt from a failed business.

choices.label: Appreciate the honesty
choices.resultText: Trust deepened, even if the future looked complicated.

choices.label: End things tonight
choices.resultText: You wished they had told you sooner. The door closed firmly.

events.text: Your spouse suggests relocating for their dream job in another city. Boxes and goodbyes flash through your mind.

choices.label: Agree to explore the move
choices.resultText: You started researching neighbourhoods together.

choices.label: Insist on staying put
choices.resultText: They nodded, but disappointment hung in the air.

events.text: Your parent hints they cannot cover upcoming medical bills alone. Pride wars with need in their voice.

choices.label: Send money this week
choices.resultText: Gratitude poured through the phone. Duty felt like love.

choices.label: Offer emotional support only
choices.resultText: They thanked you stiffly. The bills remained.
